name: Italian Lemon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Neufchatel or light cream cheese
1 1/2 cups Unsalted butter or margarine, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix ricotta cheese, cream cheese, sugar, egg yolks, milk, flour, lemon juice, and lemon rind in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Spread half of the Phyllo pastry mixture evenly at the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
5. Bake for 15 minutes or until set.
6. Remove from oven and spread remaining Phyllo pastry mixture over hot filling.
7. Sprinkle with melted butter.
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until topping is golden brown and center is nearly set.
9. Let cool completely before serving.
